fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 66. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 63. FLAG (2026-07-24 editorial wave 7): codex gpt-5.6-sol web research found NO credible evidence a mass-participation road event called 'Gran Fondo Sibiu' exists. The 149.7km/2,500m vitals closely match a real but entirely different thing — Randonneurs România's permanent, self-supported 'Super GRandonnée: La margine de Sibiu' route (~150km/2,500m, 5 riders total since 2019), not a gran fondo race. Every dimension score here was set against unverifiable, likely-conflated course facts. Recommend a human decide whether to remove/tombstone this profile. Numbers left untouched per no-silent-reshuffle rule; do not treat this score as trustworthy.

course_description.character: UNVERIFIED. No organizer, results archive, registration page, or Romanian Cycling Federation listing for a mass-participation road race called 'Gran Fondo Sibiu' could be found. The stored distance/elevation (roughly 150km/2,500m) closely matches Randonneurs România's Super GRandonnée 'La margine de Sibiu' — but that is a permanent, self-supported randonnée route starting and finishing at Cristian (outside Sibiu), routed over the Jina and Păltiniș climbs, subject to a 20-hour limit, with no mass start, no aid stations, and no event-day entry fee. It has been ridden by only five cyclists (eighteen times total) since its 2019 inauguration — completely incompatible with this profile's claimed 500-800-rider field and July race-day framing. Two other real Sibiu-area cycling events (the professional Sibiu Cycling Tour and its amateur Transfăgărășan Challenge) also do not match this profile's claims.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Abundant hotels in historic Sibiu old town; book early for event weekend.

history.origin_story: UNVERIFIED. No founding date, organizer, or edition history could be confirmed for an event called 'Gran Fondo Sibiu.' If the underlying route is Randonneurs România's Super GRandonnée 'La margine de Sibiu,' that permanent route was inaugurated in 2019 — but it is not a gran fondo race and should not be presented as one.

biased_opinion.verdict: Not Verifiable — Likely Fabricated or Conflated
biased_opinion.summary: codex gpt-5.6-sol web research (2026-07-24) found no credible evidence that a mass-participation road race called 'Gran Fondo Sibiu' exists or has ever existed. The stored course figures (roughly 150km/2,500m) trace to a real but fundamentally different thing: Randonneurs România's permanent, self-supported 'Super GRandonnée: La margine de Sibiu' route, ridden by a total of five cyclists across eighteen attempts since 2019 — a permanent brevet route with no mass start, no aid stations, and no race-day entry fee, not a 500-800-rider gran fondo. None of this profile's YouTube-attached videos (the professional Sibiu Cycling Tour, an unrelated Whistler GranFondo clip, a personal e-bike restoration story, and a 2009 Romanian national tour) depict an event matching this profile's claims either. This profile should not be treated as evidence of an active, scoreable race.
weaknesses: No independent evidence this event exists under this name — no organizer, results, registration, or federation record found
Stored course figures trace to a real permanent randonnée route ridden by only five people ever, incompatible with the claimed 500-800-rider field
The 'official_site' field was previously a bare placeholder ('https://'), a strong signal no real source was ever found
All four attached YouTube videos are unrelated to any event matching this profile's claims
biased_opinion.bottom_line: Do not present this as a bookable race. Recommend a human decide whether to remove this profile from the catalog entirely (same disposition as prior fabricated-entry findings in this database) or, if the intent was the real Randonneurs România permanent route, replace it with a properly researched and correctly categorized profile of that route instead.

final_verdict.one_liner: Unverifiable — no credible evidence this race exists; likely conflated with a permanent randonnée route ridden by only 5 people ever.
final_verdict.should_you_race: No — this event cannot be verified to exist. Do not register or plan around it.
final_verdict.alternatives: For a real Sibiu-area cycling challenge: the professional Sibiu Cycling Tour's amateur Transfăgărășan Challenge (Sibiu to Păltiniș, ~29km/950m) is a genuine, currently active event — but it is a very different, much shorter ride than what this profile describes.
